_comment: Project-level MCP server configuration for Claude Code. Credentials and paths come from the user's .env — never committed here.

shopify-dev._purpose: Official Shopify developer MCP — Liquid docs, Admin/Storefront API schemas, theme validation. No credentials required.

shopify-admin._purpose: Shopify Admin API access. Requires SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN and SHOPIFY_ADMIN_API_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env.

playwright._purpose: Browser automation via the user's own Chrome + Profile 16. Because it reuses the existing profile, all logins (GYG, Shopify admin, etc.) are already saved — no password handling needed. See scripts/README.md and .claude/access.md §3b.
playwright._profile_note: CHROME_USER_DATA_DIR and CHROME_PROFILE must be set in .env. Example values are in .env.example.
playwright._important: Close Google Chrome before starting this MCP — Chrome locks the profile directory when running. If Claude can't launch the browser, check that no Chrome window is open.
